methodology.deterministic: In-memory protocol mechanics only; the omitted adapter passes no rebase property and exercises the incremental branch of the shared runtime policy resolver. Strict-only defaults are covered by runtime tests, not this corpus. No model, OpenCode baseline, or semantic-code claim.
methodology.staticSize: Exact UTF-8 bytes for one generated 1,000-line fixture; not token estimates.
methodology.renderingWireSize: Exact UTF-8 bytes for one synthetic preview-era long-line output without a coverage marker versus the current issued output under a 4,096-byte budget.
methodology.coverageHeaderWireSize: Exact UTF-8 header bytes for the former header without coverage and the current coverage=partial|complete header across complete, partial, and cumulatively completing pages.
methodology.operationSchemaWireSize: Exact compact UTF-8 JSON bytes for the hashline_edit description plus raw z.toJSONSchema fixture, compared with a synthetic baseline derived from that current schema; not a provider projection or token estimate.
methodology.writeOperationSchemaWireSize: Exact compact UTF-8 JSON bytes for the hashline_write raw z.toJSONSchema fixture and its reconstructed pre-change baseline with optional createParents; not a provider projection or token estimate.
methodology.fileLifecycleCallWireSize: Exact compact UTF-8 JSON bytes for valid Better Hashline lifecycle calls and equivalent native apply_patch calls; no semantic or safety advantage is inferred from size.
methodology.editProtocolUxCallWireSize: Exact compact UTF-8 JSON bytes for legacy explicit controls versus inferred readback, empty-file, and parent-creation calls.
methodology.replaceFileReadbackCallWireSize: Exact compact UTF-8 request bytes for replace_file with omitted readback versus explicit readback:true, plus a standalone hashline_read request. Omission requests no readback; the reported call-input savings apply only when explicit readback attaches a usable successor page. Response bytes and attachment availability are not measured.
methodology.transferCallWireSize: Exact compact UTF-8 JSON bytes for copy/move calls versus equivalent model-supplied insert/replace payloads.
methodology.moveCorridorWireSize: Exact UTF-8 hashline_read output bytes required to issue fixed near and far move corridors under the default page and output limits.
methodology.micro: Five warmups, 100 measured runs below 10k lines and 30 otherwise; wall-clock timings are non-gating.

summary.description: Exact retained snapshot; stale files reject.
Exact snapshot plus explicit conservative unique relocation.
Omitted incremental rebase uses the shared runtime policy resolver.
Target-only exact old-text/boundary matching without fuzzy fallback.
Original line numbers applied directly to the live file.
8-bit hashes validate range endpoints at original line numbers.
16-bit hashes validate range endpoints at original line numbers.

renderingWireSize.scenario: one 3,000-character ASCII line with a 4,096-byte output budget

operationSchemaWireSize.scenario: hashline_edit description plus raw JSON Schema fixture
